class.name: ARGeoAnchor
class.brief_description: A GPS-positioned anchor for geo-referenced AR content.
class.description: Represents a world position defined by latitude, longitude, and altitude. Used with [method ARSession.run_geo_tracking]. [b]iOS 14+ only.[/b] On visionOS and macOS, this type exists for API consistency but is never populated with real tracking data.

method.name: create
method.description: Creates a geo anchor at the given latitude, longitude, and altitude.

method.name: create_at_coordinate
method.description: Creates a geo anchor at the given latitude and longitude, letting ARKit determine the altitude when possible.

members.member: How the altitude value was determined. See [enum AltitudeSource].
The geographic coordinate stored as [code]Vector2(latitude, longitude)[/code].
A unique identifier for this geo anchor.
The anchor transform in world space once geo tracking has localized it.

constants.constant: The altitude was estimated from a coarse data source.
The altitude was determined from a precise data source.
The altitude value was provided explicitly by the user or app.
